game_name: Nazo no Murasamejō (The Mysterious Murasame Castle)

special_mechanics.name: Katana Combat
special_mechanics.description: Close-range melee weapon usable when Takamaru is close to enemies or projectiles (excluding fireballs). Can deflect projectiles.

special_mechanics.name: Shuriken Combat
special_mechanics.description: Ranged weapon usable when Takamaru is at distance from enemies. Upgradeable but lost on death.

special_mechanics.name: Cloak/Invisibility Power-up
special_mechanics.description: Makes Takamaru invisible and invulnerable to enemies and objects for a short period of time.

special_mechanics.name: Invincibility State
special_mechanics.description: When Takamaru reaches more than 99 lives, he becomes invincible.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative/empirical data only. Source material (Wikipedia article) contains no quantitative movement physics data. Game is action-adventure with top-down view (not side-scrolling), so traditional platformer jump/gravity mechanics may not be primary focus. Information available is limited to gameplay description and design intent.
sources_used: wikipedia - The Mysterious Murasame Castle article
